title: Health Requirements, Technical Standards and Safety Requirements for Health Facilities Version 2
summary: Defines telemedicine as medical consultation through telephone, email, video conference or other electronic means and sets requirements for telemedicine centres, including service, consent, pricing and treatment limitations.

theme_notes.digital_health.telehealth_digital_servic: Health facility licensing standards including telemedicine centres.

notes: Related instruments: Related to NHRA health facility licensing and telemedicine circulars
